mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LZCUSTOMERINFOR (SHOPCODE, SHOPNAME, SHOPBOSS, FUNDINGLIMIT, FUNDINGRATIO) VALUES ( #{map.shopCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{map.shopName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{map.shopBoss, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{map.fundingLimit, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{map.fundingRatio, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE LZCUSTOMERINFOR SET SHOPCODE = #{map.shopCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHOPNAME = #{map.shopName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHOPBOSS = #{map.shopBoss, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FUNDINGLIMIT = #{map.fundingLimit, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FUNDINGRATIO = #{map.fundingRatio, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE ID = #{map.id}
